name: www-template
description: www-template monorepo with Svelte frontend, TypeSpec contract, and Go backend

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "pnpm dev:server" "pnpm dev:admin-server" "pnpm dev:web" "pnpm dev:app" "pnpm dev:admin"
scripts.build:client: pnpm build:web && pnpm build:app && pnpm build:admin
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @www-template/typespec check && pnpm --filter @www-template/web check && pnpm --filter @www-template/app check && pnpm --filter @www-template/ui check && pnpm --filter @www-template/admin-api check && pnpm --filter @www-template/admin-domain check && pnpm --filter @www-template/admin-app check && pnpm --filter @www-template/i18n check && bash scripts/go/build.sh
scripts.gen:api-sdk: pnpm gen:openapi && pnpm --filter @www-template/api gen && pnpm --filter @www-template/admin-api gen && prettier --write packages/frontend/api/src/generated/client.ts packages/admin/api/src/generated/client.ts
scripts.test:run: pnpm --filter @www-template/web test && pnpm --filter @www-template/app test && pnpm --filter @www-template/admin-api test && pnpm --filter @www-template/admin-domain test && pnpm --filter @www-template/admin-app test && pnpm --filter @www-template/ui test:run && pnpm --filter @www-template/i18n test:run && pnpm test:root && bash scripts/go/test.sh
scripts.test:admin: pnpm --filter @www-template/admin-api test && pnpm --filter @www-template/admin-domain test && pnpm --filter @www-template/admin-app test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @www-template/typespec lint:openapi && pnpm lint:eslint && pnpm lint:i18n:coverage && pnpm lint:stylelint && bash scripts/go/lint.sh && bash scripts/security/lint-security.sh && pnpm check:codegen && pnpm lint:api-admin-policy
scripts.lint:eslint: pnpm lint:eslint:root && pnpm lint:eslint:frontend && pnpm lint:eslint:ui && pnpm lint:eslint:admin && pnpm lint:eslint:i18n
scripts.lint:api-admin-policy: ! grep -r '/api/admin/' packages/frontend/api/src/generated/ packages/backend/internal/generated/ packages/typespec/openapi/ packages/typespec/src/ 2>/dev/null || (echo 'ERROR: /api/admin/ must not appear in generated code, Go bindings, or TypeSpec' && exit 1)
scripts.lint:eslint:root: node --max-old-space-size=4096 --expose-gc scripts/eslint-gc.js --no-inline-config --max-warnings 0 commitlint.config.js eslint.config.js playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts scripts tests
scripts.lint:eslint:frontend: pnpm --filter @www-template/web exec svelte-kit sync && pnpm --filter @www-template/app exec svelte-kit sync && node --max-old-space-size=4096 --expose-gc scripts/eslint-gc.js --no-inline-config --max-warnings 0 packages/frontend/api packages/frontend/domain packages/frontend/app packages/web packages/frontend/i18n
scripts.lint:eslint:admin: pnpm --filter @www-template/admin-app exec svelte-kit sync && node --max-old-space-size=4096 --expose-gc scripts/eslint-gc.js --no-inline-config --max-warnings 0 packages/admin/app packages/admin/domain packages/admin/api
scripts.lint:openspec: pnpm exec openspec validate --all --strict && node scripts/openspec/verify-change-intent.mjs && node --test scripts/openspec/verify-change-intent.test.mjs
